prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约4654名，2023年约4346名，2024年约3413名，2025年物理类约4181名。近四年位次波动较大，2024年大幅前移（竞争加剧），2025年明显 后移（竞争缓和），整体呈震荡格局；2025年基准位次约4181名；2022-2024年理科计划均为35人，2025年物理类计划31人，2026年物理类计划30人，较2 025年小幅缩招1人（约-3.2%），竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第81名→2026年第72名，近年排名 稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；抖音热度排名第96位（评价"一般"），综合热度约16.3万，在211高校中属中等偏下水平；声誉文件未收录东华大学相关负 面事件，整体舆情平稳，无明显投档断档记录；材料科学与工程为A级学科（第五轮学科评估），纺织科学与工程为传统王牌（"双一流"学科），与招生专业中 的材料类、纺织类、功能材料等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，东华大学上 述专业均有招生；本省2025年物理类考生约44491人，2026年总考生约66000人，按历史比例估算物理类约44550人，考生规模基本持平；东华大学位于上海（一线城市），对宁夏考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在宁夏招生人数较少（2025年物理类31人、历史类6人），招生占比极小，属于跨省招生中的 小规模投放。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4181名、2026年小幅缩招1人（竞争略加剧）、软科排名持续上升（学校吸引力增强）、考生规模基本持平及专业热度分化等 因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次；预测最低位次约4130名，区间3630-4630名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 4654, in 2023 approximately 4346, in 2024 approximately 3413, and in 2025 for physics category approximately 4181. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past four years, with a substantial forward shift in 2024 (increased competition) and a notable backward shift in 2025 (eased competition), showing an oscillating pattern; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4181; the science plan was 35 students from 2022 to 2024, the physics category plan for 2025 is 31 students, and for 2026 it is 30 students, a slight reduction of 1 student compared to 2025 (about -3.2%), leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been steadily rising, from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; its Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (rated 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity of about 163,000, which is moderately low among 211 universities; no negative incidents related to Donghua University were recorded in the reputation file, overall public opinion is stable, with no significant admission gaps; Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), Textile Science and Engineering is a traditional ace ('Double First-Class' discipline), directly corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Materials, Textiles, and Functional Materials, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and Donghua University offers these majors; in 2025, the number of physics category examinees in the province is approximately 44,491, and in 2026 the total examinees are about 66,000, with an estimated physics category of about 44,550 based on historical proportions, so the examinee scale is roughly stable; Donghua University is located in Shanghai (a first-tier city), which has a strong regional appeal for Ningxia examinees; the university enrolls a small number of students in Ningxia (31 in physics category and 6 in history category in 2025), accounting for a very small proportion, making it a small-scale cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4181, a slight reduction of 1 student in 2026 (slightly intensified competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhanced university appeal), roughly stable examinee scale, and differentiation in major popularity, the predicted minimum admission ranking for physics category in 2026 is: predicted minimum ranking approximately 4130, with a range of 3630-4630.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3630-4630, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Materials Class, Mathematics Class, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Textile Class, Chemistry Class, Functional Materials, etc.) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3630), you can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 4630), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1127名、2026年招生计 划持平、考生规模基本持平、历史类招生专业社会热度偏冷（新闻传播学类明显劝退）等因素，预计2026年历史类最低录取位次；预测最低位次 约1112名，区间912-1312名。

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
